event.name: Algorithmics IT Competition 2025
event.description: Annual programming competition showcasing innovative projects and presentations

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — INTRO / WALK-IN
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Ghostbusters Theme – Ray Parker Jr.
👉 Play it loudly as the team confidently walks on stage, waving or doing cool team gestures.

🎭 Action:
All team members enter the stage with confident energy, matching the beat of the song.

🎤 Dialogue Starts With:
OMAR (at center stage):

“Ladies and gentlemen, Distinguished guests, partners and friends … Good afternoon!”
(Pause for breath & emphasis)
“This is not just a normal day. This is an urgent meeting called by our team “the 404 Killers”… because we have one mission: how to win the Algorithmics IT Competition!”

🕰 Comedy bit (Omar notices Imrane is missing, calls him, no answer).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — MEETING BEGINS
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Omar invites everyone to sit in a roundtable-like manner. Transition to more serious tone.

📜 Dialogue Highlights:

Omar introduces the topic: "Why Sporocco?"

He passes the floor to Yassmine.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — THE WHY (Yassmine)
scenes.content:
🎤 YASSMINE:

“Imagine you’re in Agadir, ready for some fun — but… you don’t know what to do.”
“That’s where Sporocco comes in…”

🎵 Background Music (optional):
🎶 Feel-good instrumental, e.g. "Island" by MBB (royalty-free tropical vibes). Keep low volume under voice.

💡 Stage: Brighten lights to match excitement and discovery.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TECHNICAL PART (BACKEND)
scenes.content:
🎤 SALMAN (Backend):

“We used Python to build a quiz to test your knowledge of local sports & activities…”

🎵 Background:
🎶 Techno/Minimal Beat — suggest: "Inspired" by Kevin MacLeod (royalty-free).

🧑‍💻 On screen: You can project a terminal view or mock quiz demo.

🎤 ANISS (Frontend):

“We built Sporocco’s interface using HTML, CSS & JavaScript…”

💡 Stage Lighting: Cooler, blue hues for tech mood. Switch to warm tones as Aniss finishes.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMO TIME
scenes.content:
🎤 IMRANE:
Live demonstration scene. Imrane explains the actual site/app while interacting with a projected screen.

🎵 Music:
No music here. Focus on live sounds/clicks for immersion.

🖥 On screen: Show homepage > map > booking feature > chatbot demo.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — BUSINESS MODEL & IMPACT
scenes.content:
🎤 YASSER:

“Users can shop for activities and book them directly on Sporocco…”

🎤 SOFIA:

“Sporocco supports small businesses and promotes healthy living…”

💡 Tip: Show infographics or mock UI with fake bookings, smiling tourists, local vendors.

🎵 Music Suggestion:
🎶 Motivational Corporate instrumental – e.g. "Success Dreams" by MusicbyAden (free).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — VISION & CALL TO ACTION
scenes.content:
🎤 OMAR:

“Sporocco is more than a platform — it's a movement…”

Talks about the 5-year plan to grow Agadir’s sports tourism.

💡 Lighting: Use warm spotlights on speaker. Fade others.

🎵 Music Under Voice:
🎶 Epic & inspirational track – Suggest: "Time" by Hans Zimmer (instrumental or similar vibe).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — FINAL MOMENT
scenes.content:
🎤 OMAR:

“Together, we are not just students…”

🎤 ALL (in sync, loud):

“We are the Bug Busters — Code Saviors!”

🎵 MUSIC BLAST:
🎶 Ghostbusters Theme again (like an encore)
👉 Big exit, wave to the audience, strike a team pose!

teams.name: The Innovators
teams.slogan: Move your Feet to Massa's Beat

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — OPENING SONG / ENTRANCE
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Live team performance of “Massa’s Melodies” intro song
👉 Begins immediately as team enters, one by one, with instruments and karaoke screen in background.

🎭 Action:

Each member enters the stage in order, holding a musical instrument or doing a gesture related to the lyrics.

Lyrics are sung one line at a time.

🎤 Dialogue / Singing Order:

HAFSA MOURADI: 🎵 “Flutes like whispers in the evening breeze”

MALAK ELFAQIR: 🎵 “Voices rising through the olive trees”

SOHAIB LAMZIZOUA: 🎵 “Seven hearts”

GHOUFRANE ABACHOUCH: 🎵 “One rhythm”

YASSIR EL MAKKAOUI: 🎵 “A tune complete”

HAFSA ASSOUAB: 🎵 “Step with pride”

JAD EL ATROUZ: 🎵 “To Massa’s beat”

🎤 ALL TOGETHER – CHORUS:
🎵 “Move your feet”
🎵 “Let the rhythm take control”
🎵 “Feel the magic deep within your soul”
🎵 “Seven voices singing loud and sweet”
🎵 “Move your feet to Massa’s beat”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHY MASSA’S MELODIES?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

After the chorus, team quiets down. Stage lights focus on Ghoufrane.

Instruments are placed aside or kept for ambiance.

🎤 GHOUFRANE ABACHOUCH:

“Ladies and gentlemen,
Have you ever heard a song… and felt like it told your story?
That’s the power of Massa’s Melodies.”
“We chose these songs because they’re part of our cultural heritage… they carry our language, identity, and soul.”
“By teaching them, we make sure the stories behind them live on.”
“So now… can you tell us Jad, what exactly is Massa’s Melodies?”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHAT IS MASSA’S MELODIES?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Light shifts to JAD standing center stage.

🎤 JAD EL ATROUZ:

“Yes Ghoufrane, of course…
Massa’s Melodies is a platform to explore Moroccan music using just three notes.”
“We include traditional styles like Daka Lhwaria, Gnawa, Rwayce, and Ahwach.”
“Each one tells its own story — through rhythm, history, and region.”
“And each melody comes with explanations to help users connect with it.”
“So now that you know what it is — Hafsa, how did we build it?”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TOOLS & TECHNOLOGY
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Transition to Hafsa Assouab, who steps forward with confident posture.

🎤 HAFSA ASSOUAB:

“Thank you Jad…
We used Visual Studio Code to build our website.”
“HTML gave us the structure. CSS made it beautiful. JavaScript made it come alive.”
“We’re also adding cybersecurity features to protect our users.”
“Now, let’s see how it all works with Malak!”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMONSTRATION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Projector turns on or screen activates.

Malak gives a live or pre-recorded demo (as noted in original script).

🎤 MALAK ELFAQIR:

[Script not fully provided — speaker gives live or video walkthrough of the platform]

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — MONETIZATION MODEL
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Malak finishes. Sohaib steps forward confidently.

🎤 SOHAIB LAMZIZOUA:

“Thank you Malak…
I’m Sohaib and I’ll explain our business model.”
“First, a marketplace: we take a commission on musical instrument sales.”
“Second, an LMS: users can learn music online through lessons.”
“This supports both sellers and students — and keeps the music flowing.”

“But now… let’s ask Yassir about the real-world impact.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — CULTURAL IMPACT
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Yassir stands calmly, hands at sides or gesturing warmly.

🎤 YASSIR EL MAKKAOUI:

“Massa’s Melodies impacts three big areas:”
“Tourism — bringing visitors through music.”
“Economy — helping artists and sellers make income.”
“Culture — keeping our roots alive and shared with the world.”

“And now, Hafsa — tell them where we go from here.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — VISION & FUTURE
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Lighting focuses on Hafsa Mouradi. She speaks with vision and hope.

🎤 HAFSA MOURADI:

“Our vision is simple: to keep culture alive through music.”
“Massa’s Melodies is a bridge between people and tradition.”
“Next, we plan to partner with schools and musicians, join global festivals, and build a mobile app.”
“Each note is a celebration of Amazigh identity — and a way to support local talent.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 8 — CLOSING MOMENT
scenes.content:
🎤 HAFSA MOURADI:

“So now, we ask you…”
“Will you help us keep the rhythm alive?”
“Will you help us share the voice of our culture with the world?”

🎤 ALL TOGETHER (loud & joyful):

“Join us… and move your feet to Massa’s beat!”

🎵 [MUSIC CUE: Return to live music – instruments playing softly or rhythmically]

🎭 Final Action:

Team plays a final beat or rhythm together.

Final wave, bow, or signature pose with instruments.

teams.name: Young Markerters
teams.slogan: Looking For vibes ? We are the guides?

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — OPENING VISUAL
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Lights down.

A video begins to play on the screen — a visual metaphor with scenes of Agadir.

🎥 Visual Metaphor Text on Screen (Voiceover or Subtitle):

“From hidden streets to ocean tide,
We bring the soul you’d never find.
Tap the vibe — let Agadir guide.”

Stage Direction:

After the video ends, lights come up.

Team members step forward confidently.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHY A.V.G.?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Spotlight on YOUNES as he steps forward.

🎤 YOUNES SELMI:

“Hello everyone, my name is Younes.
We chose Agadir because it’s full of life and culture that tourists often miss.”
“Most guides are boring — we wanted something fresh and visual.”
“As young marketers, we created this guide: A.V.G.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHY THE FLYER?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Spotlight shifts to ILYAS, stepping in smoothly after Younes.

🎤 ILYAS REDDAH:

“Hello, I’m Ilyas, and I’ll explain why we chose an interactive flyer.”
“It’s more fun than a normal one — you can open it, move parts, and even… check boxes!”
“Now, Salma will tell you how we built it step by step.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TOOLS & PROCESS
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

SALMA SKOURI takes center stage with a confident tone.

🎤 SALMA SKOURI:

“Hello everyone, I am Salma. I’ll explain how we built the interactive flyer — Agadir Vibes Guide — step by step.”
“We used Google, ChatGPT, Canva, and GIMP to bring it to life.”

📌 Breakdown (Salma continues):

“ChatGPT helped us brainstorm ideas.”

“Google helped us find images and activities.”

“GIMP was used to design the logo.”

“Then we used Canva to compile the project.”

“Now, let’s move to what A.V.G. looks like — with my friend Youmna!”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMONSTRATION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Spotlight on YOUMNA. She presents the flyer visually.

🎤 YOUMNA:

[Live walkthrough of each page of the flyer — demonstrating layout, content, and interactions.]

Stage Note:

Display the flyer pages on a screen as she explains them.

Optional gestures like “flipping” a virtual page or highlighting sections with a pointer.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — IMPACT & CALL TO ACTION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:

Spotlight on SALMA EZZAOUINI, standing forward to wrap up.

🎤 SALMA EZZAOUINI:

“Thank you, Youmna, for the presentation of our flyer!”
“A.V.G. has a strong impact on both tourists and the city of Agadir.”
“First: It helps tourists know where to go and what to do.”
“Second: It helps locals get more visitors and grow their businesses.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — CLOSING MOMENT
scenes.content:
🎤 SALMA EZZAOUINI:

“So my question now… ARE YOU LOOKING FOR THE VIBE?”

🎤 ALL (together, loud and enthusiastic):

“YES! WE ARE THE GUIDE!”

🎭 Action:

All team members step forward and pose confidently.

They smile, gesture toward the audience, or hold up a copy of the flyer as a finale.

teams.name: Future Designers
teams.slogan: Smart by design, Agadir is devine

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — OPENING VISUAL
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Lights down. Video projection shows Agadir’s palm trees blending into hands shaping the city skyline.

🎥 Visual Metaphor Text (Voiceover):
"What connects a root to a gesture?
What turns tradition into a message?
Agadir holds the answer — in its palm."

Stage Direction:
Lights rise. Team FUTURE DESIGNERS steps forward.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHY PALM OF AGADIR?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Spotlight on ADAM EL BAZ.

🎤 ADAM EL BAZ:
*"Ladies and gentlemen, meet THE PALM OF AGADIR!
I’m Adam, and our name is no accident.
It carries a double meaning:

The palm tree – rooted in Agadir’s heritage, growing toward tomorrow.

The palm of the hand – symbolizing support, creativity, and human connection.
Together, they shout: ‘Rooted in culture, reaching with purpose!’
Now, Loujaine reveals why we chose a billboard!"*

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHY THE BILLBOARD?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Spotlight shifts to LOUJAINE CHAOUB.

🎤 LOUJAINE CHAOUB:
*"Hello! Why a billboard?

Unlike posters or reels – it stands still and speaks loud in the real world.

It’s public, bold, and planted at Agadir’s heart.

It lifts youth voices to reach locals AND tourists.
For Palm of Agadir? This is the perfect stage!
Youssra will now show how we brought it to life!"*

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TOOLS & PROCESS
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Spotlight on YOUSSRA AMENZOU holding digital tablet.

🎤 YOUSSRA AMENZOU:
*"Hello! Our creative toolbox? Three keys unlocked this vision:

Google – Our research engine for images and inspiration.

GIMP – Where we painted dreams and edited visuals.

Inkscape – Crafting sharp logos that scale to any size!
And now… witness the result!"*

Stage Note:
Screen displays the billboard design as she gestures.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMONSTRATION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Full stage lights. Team unveils large billboard mockup.

🎤 YOUSSRA (CONT’D):
"Behold: The Palm of Agadir!
A landmark that turns tourists’ heads and fuels local business.
Smart by design – Agadir shines divine!"

Stage Note:
Team points to billboard’s key features: palm tree motif, city skyline, slogan.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — VISION & CALL TO ACTION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Spotlight on LOUJAINE LAABID stepping center stage.

🎤 LOUJAINE LAABID:
"This is more than a billboard – it’s Agadir’s heartbeat!
It grows tourism, welcomes the world with style, and builds community trust.
So we ask you…"

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — CLOSING MOMENT
scenes.content:
🎤 LOUJAINE LAABID:
"ARE YOU READY TO REACH FOR THE FUTURE?"

🎤 ALL TEAM (unison):
"YES! SMART BY DESIGN – AGADIR IS DIVINE!"

🎭 Action:
Team strikes confident pose beside billboard mockup. Arms outstretched like palm fronds toward audience.

teams.name: Next Gen Dev's
teams.slogan: One vesion, One Team, One Goal !

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — INTRO / WALK-IN
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 “Can’t Stop the Feeling” – Justin Timberlake (or your team’s original background music)
👉 Play loudly as the team walks in with confidence and energy.

🎭 Action:
All 9 members of NEXT GEN DEV’Z enter the stage in sync — waving, smiling, forming a half-circle or V-shape.

🎤 SALMA (at center stage):
“Ladies and gentlemen, honored guests…
Welcome to the future of tourism!”
(Pause for effect)
“We are the NEXT GEN DEV’Z, and this is…”
🎤 ALL TOGETHER:
“AÏT SOUSS TRAVEL!”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHY AÏT SOUSS TRAVEL
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ZAYNAB steps forward. Spotlight on her.

🎤 ZAYNAB KHALLOUFI:
“Why Aït Souss Travel?
Because the Souss Massa region is full of beauty — but it lacks digital tools for tourism.

1️⃣ Many visitors don’t know where to go or what to do, especially in groups.
2️⃣ We wanted to change that.

So, we created a platform for group tourism — and named it “Aït Souss,” inspired by Amazigh culture.
‘Aït’ means tribe, and traveling as a tribe is exactly what we offer — shared, warm, connected!”

🎵 Music Under Voice:
🎶 Soft cultural instrumental with Amazigh vibe.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHAT IS A.S.T?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
SAAD walks forward confidently, gestures to an imaginary screen.

🎤 SAAD AHAMMAM:
“Aït Souss Travel is a user-friendly website that helps tourists:

Discover excursions, like hiking, cultural tours, and local food experiences.

Book group trips easily.

See real photos, reviews, and details in one place.

It’s about making group travel simple, exciting, and connected to the real soul of the region.”

💡 Lighting: Earthy tones, representing nature and adventure.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — BEHIND THE SCENES (TOOLS & TECH)
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
AICHA steps up, possibly holding visuals or mock UI.

🎤 AICHA ELIDRISSI:
“To build this platform, we used:

🧠 Python for the backend — handling data, logic, and future APIs.
🎨 HTML, CSS & JS for the frontend — to make it fast and responsive on all devices.

Our team worked like a real tech company: user needs → design → development → testing.
And guess what? We made it smooth, scalable, and smart!”

🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Tech-style ambient beat in background (e.g. "Inspired" by Kevin MacLeod).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMO TIME
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
MOHAMED EL MEHDI TAOUFIQ takes control of live demo or projected screenshots.

🎤 MOHAMED:
“Here’s the homepage of Aït Souss Travel. It has 3 main tabs:

Tours — where you explore all our excursions with guides, prices, and durations.

Book Guide — a form to match tourists with the right guide.

Contact & Support — for quick help by phone or email.

Everything is made with tourists in mind: clear, easy, and enjoyable.”

🖥 Visuals on Screen: Show interface, animated scrolling, or screen recording.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — HOW WE EARN (MONETIZATION)
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
SALMA returns, stands center stage.

🎤 SALMA FASKA:
“How do we make Aït Souss Travel sustainable?

✅ Three tourist plans:

Basic (Terrestrial)

Plus (Aquatic + Terrestrial)

Premium (All-in: paragliding, surfing & more)

✅ Local business partnerships:
Hotels, restaurants, and guest houses — we connect tourists to them and take a small commission.

Simple. Smart. Sustainable.”

🎵 Background Music:
🎶 Corporate upbeat track, light and hopeful.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — SPREADING THE WORD (MARKETING)
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
RIMA walks forward confidently, maybe pointing at a live social media page on screen.

🎤 RIMA BIDOULI:
“To grow our platform, we’re using:
📱 Instagram — already live and engaging!
🤝 Partnerships — with other youth projects and local businesses.

We don’t just market A.S.T…
We promote our region. Our culture. Our identity.”

💡 Lighting Change: Warm tones for community and connection.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — VISION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ISLAM walks to center stage with calm confidence.

🎤 ISLAM OUAHMANE:
“Our dream? To take Aït Souss Travel worldwide.

🌍 Multilingual versions
🤝 Global partners
🎫 International travel expos

We want people from everywhere to discover the magic of Agadir and Souss Massa.
This is just the beginning.”

🎵 Background Music:
🎶 Epic instrumental like “Time” by Hans Zimmer.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 8 — IMPACT
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
TASSNIME speaks with emotion and purpose.

🎤 TASSNIME NASREDDINE:
“This project isn’t just tech. It’s transformation.

💚 Locally — we empower small businesses and communities.
📈 Regionally — we boost tourism, create jobs, and spotlight hidden gems.
🇲🇦 Nationally — we push for a stronger, more connected Morocco.

Aït Souss Travel changes how we travel — and how we grow.”

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 9 — FINAL SCENE / CALL TO ACTION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ARWA steps forward. Team regroups behind her.

🎤 ARWA NDILY:
“To summarize:

We built a real platform, from zero.

We blended culture, tech, and heart.

We didn’t just dream — we delivered.

Aït Souss Travel is not a school project…
It’s our first step as future developers and entrepreneurs.

🎤 SALMA (raises hand):
“Let’s end as one team…”

🎤 ALL TOGETHER, LOUD & PROUD:
“One Vision — One Team — One Goal!”

🎵 Music Blast:
🎶 Team’s original background track (or a remix of your intro music)
👉 Group pose. Applause. Optional dance or celebratory wave.

teams.name: United Nest
teams.slogan: Build to help, Born to unite!

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — INTRO / WALK-IN
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 "Can’t Stop the Feeling" – Justin Timberlake (or team’s original track)
👉 Play loudly as the team walks in with energy.

🎭 Action:
All 9 UNITED NEST members enter in sync – waving, smiling, forming a V-shape.

🎤 IBRAHIM LFAHIM (center stage):
"Ladies and gentlemen, honored guests…
Welcome to the future of mental wellness in travel!"
(Pause for effect)
"We are UNITED NEST, and this is…"
🎤 ALL TOGETHER:
"HELP NEST!"

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHY HELP NEST?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
NASSIM DAOUAJI steps forward. Spotlight.

🎤 NASSIM DAOUAJI:
"Why Help Nest?
Travel can be isolating – especially for those battling anxiety or loneliness.
We built a digital sanctuary inspired by nature’s safest space:
A nest.
Warm. Protective. A home for support anywhere on Earth."

🎵 Music Under Voice:
🎶 Soothing piano with bird sounds.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHAT IS HELP NEST?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ANIR EZZAQUINI gestures to imaginary app screens.

🎤 ANIR EZZAQUINI:
"Help Nest is your travel guardian angel:
📍 1. Mood-based adventures – Discover cafés/hikes matching your vibe.
🧠 2. Mental health lifeline – Connect to psychologists in seconds.
All designed to make trips joyful AND emotionally safe."

💡 Lighting: Soft blue tones (calm + tech).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TECH HEARTBEAT (TOOLS)
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
YOUSSEF & SAMY present together with code visuals.

🎤 YOUSSEF RZEQ:
"Backend?
🐍 Python + 🛡 Django – for rock-solid security and scaling!"

🎤 SAMY CHARI:
"Frontend?
💻 HTML/CSS/JS – wrapped in Figma’s serene designs.
Every pixel says: ‘You’re safe here.’"

🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Tech-glitch beats ("Inspired" – Kevin MacLeod).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — DEMO TIME
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
IBRAHIM controls live app demo on screen.

🎤 IBRAHIM LFAHIM:
"Watch this:
1️⃣ Homepage – Moroccan cities → activities → instant booking.
2️⃣ Mood Calendar – Track feelings → get weekly insights.
3️⃣ ‘Seek Help’ – DM therapists or book sessions NOW.
All in 3 taps. Zero stress."

🖥 Visuals: App screens with smooth transitions.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — SUSTAINABILITY ($$$)
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
MOHAMED AMINE strides confidently.

🎤 MOHAMED AMINE EL HADDAOUI:
"How we thrive:
💡 Subscription tiers – Exclusive tools for psychologists.
🤝 Win-win partnerships – Local businesses pay to reach tourists.
Value-driven. Ethical. Profitable."

🎵 Background: Corporate upbeat track.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — IMPACT EXPLOSION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
LINA EL ATROUZ speaks with passionate urgency.

🎤 LINA EL ATROUZ:
"We’re igniting change:
✈️ Tourism – Safer solo travel → More visitors to Morocco.
💰 Economy – Bookings boost local cafés + guides.
💙 Health – Breaking mental health taboos, one chat at a time!"

💡 Lighting: Warm gold (hope + growth).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — FUTURE VISION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
NASSIM returns, arms wide.

🎤 NASSIM DAOUAJI:
"This isn’t an app. It’s a GLOBAL MOVEMENT.
Next step?
🌍 Worldwide nests.
*👥 1M+ supported travelers.*
🚀 Partnerships with UNICEF + WHO.
Join the revolution!"

🎵 Background:
🎶 Epic instrumental ("Time" – Hans Zimmer).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 8 — UNITED CALL TO ACTION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Full team joins hands center stage.

🎤 IBRAHIM LFAHIM:
"We are UNITED NEST…
🎤 ALL:
"BUILT TO HELP!
🎤 NASSIM:
"BORN TO…
🎤 ALL (LOUD & PROUD):
"UNITE!"

🎵 Music Blast:
🎶 Team’s hype track + confetti explosion.
👉 Group pose → Applause!

teams.name: 2Days
teams.slogan: One FLEX, one FEAST...FUEL your BEAST !

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — INTRO / PROBLEM REVEAL
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Suspenseful synth track (e.g., "Run Boy Run" remix)
💡 Lighting: Spotlights on three isolated actors

🎭 Action:
Three actors freeze in "traveler distress" poses center stage

🎤 MAROUANE KARIM (clutching stomach):
"Pastry... had cheese... lactose intolerance... why?!"

🎤 SALMANE TAOUFIQ (checking imaginary blood sugar):
"Diabetes + hidden sugar = danger!"

🎤 ADAM AIDI (bursting through with phone):
"HA! Try FOOD FLEX!"
(Turns to audience)
"Ladies and gentlemen... ready for food freedom?"

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — WHAT IS FOOD FLEX?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
YOUNESS AMAZOUZ steps forward as others form Moroccan food tableau

🎤 YOUNESS AMAZOUZ:
"FoodFlex is your digital souk guide!
📱 1. Culture Preservation – Authentic recipes & food stories
❤️ 2. Dietary Guardian – Filters allergies/diabetes/halal/vegan
Discover hidden gems without risking your health!"

🎵 Music Under:
🎶 Traditional guembri mixed with modern beats.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — WHY "FLEX"?
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ADAM MOUJAHID gestures to giant flexing bicep animation

🎤 ADAM MOUJAHID:
"Why 'FLEX'?
💪 Flexibility for YOUR needs
⏱️ Your time constraints
🩺 Your health conditions
🍽️ Your cravings!
No more 'can't eat'... only 'WILL eat!'"

💡 Lighting:
Vibrant multicolor spots (food diversity).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TECH KITCHEN
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
AMIR & SALMANE stand back-to-back with code projections

🎤 AMIR BIDOULI:
"Frontend?
🧑‍🍳 HTML/CSS/JS – fresh interface
🔥 C++ – turbo-charged calculations
(dietary filters in 0.3s!)"*

🎤 SALMANE TAOUFIQ:
"Backend?
🐍 Django – master chef managing:
🌍 Currency converter
🔒 CAPTCHA security
*⭐ 5-star rating system*
Serving data hotter than tagine!"

🖥 Visuals:
Animated code + cooking graphics fusion.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — USER DEMO
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
AHMED YASSINE navigates giant phone UI

🎤 AHMED YASSINE EL MAJDAOUI:
"Watch how we personalize:
1️⃣ Profile Setup – Log allergies → goals → fav cuisines
2️⃣ Smart Dashboard – "Yassine! Try this gluten-free pastilla!"
3️⃣ Food Diary – Track meals → get health insights
Your personal nutritionist in-pocket!".

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — RESTAURANT DEMO
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
SOUFIANE transforms into "chef" with apron

🎤 SOUFIANE CHERRADI:
"For restaurants? Game-changer!
📱 Upload menus – Flag allergens instantly
📈 Live analytics – "20 vegans nearby craving your harira!"
🤝 Direct bookings – No commission fees!
Be found by perfect customers!"

💡 Lighting:
Warm amber (kitchen warmth).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — MONEY PLATTER
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
AHMED AIT MIDI & MAROUANE KARIM serve "money platter" prop

🎤 AHMED AIT MIDI:
"Revenue stream 1:
💰 Subscriptions – Premium food hacks + deals
*(Tourists) $3/month*
*(Restaurants) $15/month"*

🎤 MAROUANE KARIM:
"Revenue stream 2:
📢 Smart ads –
"Diabetic? Try this sugar-free juice bar!"
*Free app? Yes! Ad-free? $5/month*
Win-win flavors!".

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — IMPACT BUFFET
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
MAROUANE EL MAJDAOUI opens arms as data projections bloom

🎤 MAROUANE EL MAJDAOUI:
"Our double impact:
👨‍⚕️ HEALTH – No more "I ate wrong" panic
🏪 ECONOMY – Small restaurants get discovered
We turn dietary limits into culinary adventures!".

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 8 — GLOBAL VISION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ADAM AIDI points to world map with glowing Morocco

🎤 ADAM AIDI:
"Next 5 years?
🌍 1. Global expansion – Start with Marrakech → Paris → Dubai
👨‍⚕️ 2. Doctor partnerships – Certified "safe eats"
🚚 3. Street food revolution – Empower cart vendors!
Making Moroccan cuisine accessible to ALL bodies!"

🎵 Music:
🎶 Epic fusion: traditional oud + future bass.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 9 — CALL TO FEAST
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Full team forms human "food chain" center stage

🎤 ADAM AIDI:
"Invest now... where every bite heals!

🎤 SALMANE TAOUFIQ:
"ONE FLEX...

🎤 ALL (THUNDERING):
"...ONE FEAST!
FUEL YOUR BEAST!"

🎵 Finale Blast:
🎶 High-energy chaabi remix + golden confetti cannon
👉 Team pose with "flexing" arms.

teams.name: HyperLink Heroes
teams.slogan: Code it, Link it, Watch us sync it !

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 0 — NEWSROOM HOOK
scenes.content:
🎵 Music Cue:
🎶 Breaking news sting (dramatic horns + drumroll)
💡 Lighting: Flashing red/blue emergency lights

🎭 Action:
YASMINE (journalist) and RAYAN (distressed tourist) frozen in spotlight

🎤 YASMINE (urgent reporter tone):
"Breaking news: Tourist collapses in Agadir streets! The cause?..."
(Spotlight shifts to RAYAN writhing dramatically)

🎤 RAYAN (gasping):
"TAGOULLA! I came from Portugal for it... WHERE IS LBERTQIZ?!"

🎤 SELYA (cameraman, zooming in):
"EW! What's 'Lbertqiz'?!"

🎤 YASMINE (turning to audience):
"This... is life without RESTORINO."

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 1 — NAME REVEAL
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
YAHIA ALLOUCHA steps forward as food market projections appear

🎤 YAHIA ALLOUCHA:
"Why 'RESTORINO'?
🔄 RESTORE – Authentic food experiences
🏪 STORE – Treasure trove of flavors
⛏️ INO (Tachelhit) – 'MY' personal culinary map
We're rebuilding food discovery!"

🎵 Music Under:
🎶 Amazigh folk strings mixed with digital glitches.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 2 — PLATFORM UNBOXED
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ZAYNAB EL AIADI "swipes" through giant floating UI

🎤 ZAYNAB EL AIADI:
"Restorino = Your food compass!
📍 1. Hidden gems – Family kitchens to street stalls
🎭 2. Culture fusion – Stories behind every tagine
🚀 3. Challenge mode – Eat 3 couscous → Win badges!
Where tech meets tradition!"

💡 Lighting:
Warm gold (Moroccan sunset).

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 3 — TECH KITCHEN
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ADAM RAGRAGUI & ADAM SKOURI "cook" code in holographic kitchen

🎤 ADAM RAGRAGUI (stirring Python pot):
"Backend recipe:
🐍 Flask – Simmering logic
📊 SQL – Data storage tajine
🧠 JavaScript – Spicy interactivity!"

🎤 ADAM SKOURI (garnishing UI):
"Frontend garnish:
🍽️ HTML/CSS – Beautiful plating
🎨 Photopea – Secret design sauce
Served at perfect UX temperature!"

🖥 Visuals:
Holographic code transforming into tagines.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 4 — UX REVOLUTION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
RAYAN controls giant interactive dashboard

🎤 RAYAN ABOULHASSAN:
"Three roles. One perfect view:
👩‍💻 TOURISTS – Filter → Book → Challenge!
👨‍🍳 OWNERS – Upload menus → Track fame → Cha-ching!
👑 ADMINS – Approve → Protect → Curate
All clutter-free. All joyful!"

🎯 Highlight:
"Eat 3 Couscous" badge animation with confetti.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 5 — MONEY FLOW
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
ADNANE EL AIADI reveals "revenue treasure chest"

🎤 ADNANE EL AIADI:
"Golden streams:
💰 1. Restaurant subscriptions – *VIP visibility $15/month*
🏆 2. Cultural grants – UNESCO loves food heritage!
Profits preserving traditions!".

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 6 — VIRAL RECIPE
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
IBRAHIM ELMANSOURI swipes through social feeds

🎤 IBRAHIM ELMANSOURI:
"Marketing spice mix:
🔍 SEO – #1 for "Agadir hidden food"
📱 Reels – Sizzling tagoulla videos
🌐 Trilingual – Arabic/French/English
🤳 Influencer collabs – "Found via Restorino!"
We'll trend hotter than harissa!".

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 7 — IMPACT FEAST
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
YASMINE MOUIHB serves "impact dishes" to actors

🎤 YASMINE MOUIHB:
"Our triple-layer impact:
👩‍🍳 LOCAL – Grandma's kitchen becomes destination
📈 REGIONAL – Souss Massa food GDP up 30%
🇲🇦 NATIONAL – Morocco = World gastronomy hub
Preserving culture one click at a time!"

💡 Lighting:
Projected Moroccan flag patterns.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 8 — GLOBAL VISION
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
SELYA BATHAHI unveils world map with glowing pins

🎤 SELYA BATHAHI:
"Next course?
1. MOROCCO → Marrakech, Fez, Chefchaouen
2. WORLD → Paris, Dubai, Tokyo
3. UNIVERSE → "Best food app" UNESCO award!
Making every hidden kitchen find its tribe!"

🎵 Music:
🎶 Epic Amazigh fusion with global beats.

scenes.title: 🎬 SCENE 9 — HYPERLINK FINALE
scenes.content:
🎭 Action:
Team forms human chain with glowing "links"

🎤 SELYA:
"No more collapsed tourists!
Join the food revolution!"

🎤 YASMINE:
"CODE IT!
🎤 RAYAN:
"LINK IT!
🎤 ALL (THUNDERING):
"WATCH US SYNC IT!"

🎵 Finale Blast:
🎶 Modern gnawa trance + pixel rain
👉 Team strikes "linking" pose with synchronized arm movements.
